001package applicationMain;
002
003import org.junit.jupiter.api.Test;
004
005import static org.junit.jupiter.api.Assertions.assertEquals;
006import static org.junit.jupiter.api.Assertions.assertNull;
007
008class ValidationUtilTest {
009
010    @Test
011    void validateAsuUserId_boundaries() {
012        assertEquals("ASU User ID must be 4–20 characters.", ValidationUtil.validateAsuUserId("abc"));
013        assertNull(ValidationUtil.validateAsuUserId("abcd"));
014        assertNull(ValidationUtil.validateAsuUserId("abcdefghijklmnopqrst"));
015        assertEquals("ASU User ID must be 4–20 characters.", ValidationUtil.validateAsuUserId("abcdefghijklmnopqrstu"));
016    }
017
018    @Test
019    void validateAsuUserId_rejectsSpacesAndSymbols() {
020        assertEquals("ASU User ID cannot contain spaces.", ValidationUtil.validateAsuUserId("user name"));
021        assertEquals("ASU User ID can only contain letters and numbers.", ValidationUtil.validateAsuUserId("user@123"));
022    }
023
024    @Test
025    void validateAsuUserId_rejectsScriptInjectionName() {
026        assertEquals("ASU User ID can only contain letters and numbers.",
027                ValidationUtil.validateAsuUserId("<script>BadCode</script>"));
028    }
029
030    @Test
031    void validateEmail_positiveAndNegativeCases() {
032        assertNull(ValidationUtil.validateEmail("student@asu.edu"));
033        assertEquals("Please enter a valid email address with one @.", ValidationUtil.validateEmail("student@@asu.edu"));
034        assertEquals("Please enter a valid email address with one @.", ValidationUtil.validateEmail(" student @asu.edu "));
035    }
036
037    @Test
038    void validatePhoneNumber_boundaries() {
039        assertEquals("Phone number must be a valid 10-digit number.", ValidationUtil.validatePhoneNumber("123456789"));
040        assertNull(ValidationUtil.validatePhoneNumber("1234567890"));
041        assertEquals("Phone number must be a valid 10-digit number.", ValidationUtil.validatePhoneNumber("12345678901"));
042        assertEquals("Phone number can only contain numbers.", ValidationUtil.validatePhoneNumber("12345abcde"));
043    }
044
045    @Test
046    void validateCourseTag_formatRules() {
047        assertNull(ValidationUtil.validateCourseTag("CSE360"));
048        assertEquals("Course tag must look like CSE360.", ValidationUtil.validateCourseTag("CSE36"));
049        assertEquals("Course tag must look like CSE360.", ValidationUtil.validateCourseTag("CSE-360"));
050    }
051}
